data.title: Speedway Stores launches 'Fill Up' campaign to position as go-to roadside reset for on-the-go consumers.
data.description: A new advertising campaign is being launched by 7-Eleven, Inc. to highlight Speedway as the top choice for quick pit stops for consumers on the move. Set to start on July 17, 2025, the Speedway 'Fill Up' campaign aims to emphasize Speedway® stores as the ultimate destination for on-the-go individuals. This multi-channel campaign will showcase the convenience and efficiency of Speedway locations, targeting consumers looking for a quick roadside reset. The campaign will feature various promotions and offers to attract customers, emphasizing Speedway as the go-to choice for quick fuel fill-ups and other necessities.

data.title: More technology in home appliances leads to reduced satisfaction, according to J.D. Power study from Troy, Mich.
data.description: TROY, Mich. - According to J.D. Power, the rise in home appliance technology is linked to a drop in customer satisfaction. The shift towards advanced tech in appliances has led to a decrease in overall satisfaction levels among consumers. This trend highlights the challenge companies face in balancing technological advancements with meeting customer expectations. The report did not specify the exact percentage of decrease in satisfaction levels, but it sheds light on the impact of technology on consumer experiences with home appliances.

data.title: Kinaxis Inc. (TSX:KXS) will hold Q2 financial results conference call on August 7 at 8:30 am Eastern Time.
data.description: Kinaxis® Inc., a leading global company in supply chain orchestration, has disclosed that its conference call to review the financial results for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025, is set to take place. Scheduled for Thursday, August 7 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, the call will be led by Bob Courteau, interim CEO and chair, and Blaine Fitzgerald, CFO. Following the financial report, a Q&A session will be held. Kinaxis® is listed on the TSX under the ticker symbol KXS.

data.title: Bristol Myers Squibb and Pfizer introduce direct-to-patient Eliquis® (apixaban) option.
data.description: In Princeton, New Jersey, Bristol Myers Squibb and Pfizer have revealed a new option for patients to acquire Eliquis (apixaban) directly. The initiative allows patients to receive the medication without going through a pharmacy. This can provide convenience and ease of access for patients prescribed Eliquis. JSNamePfizer and Bristol Myers Squibb are collaborating to provide this service for patients who require Eliquis for their treatment. This direct-to-patient option aims to streamline the process and offer an alternative to traditional pharmacy distribution. Eliquis is a widely used medication for preventing blood clots and stroke in patients with certain conditions. This initiative indicates a strategic move by the companies to enhance patient experience and accessibility to essential medications.

data.title: AUSTRAC identifies crypto as key threat in financial crime crackdown; firms urged to comply with stricter rules by 2026.
data.description: By 2026, cryptocurrency companies need to be ready for more stringent regulations as AUSTRAC focuses on addressing financial crime risks across the sector. The move aims to enhance oversight and compliance, with a particular emphasis on cracking down on illicit activities. Industries involving digital assets are urged to ensure they are equipped to meet the heightened standards and navigate the evolving regulatory landscape. This initiative underscores the significance of bolstering measures to combat financial misconduct and promote integrity within the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: Deepak Chopra teams up with ElevenLabs to make his teachings accessible via AI voice cloning, eliminating financial barriers through Supertab's user engagement model.
data.description: Renowned spiritual leader Deepak Chopra has collaborated with ElevenLabs to introduce his teachings through AI voice cloning. This partnership aims to make his wisdom accessible to a wider audience without financial constraints. The innovative use of technology will be featured on Supertab, offering a user-friendly engagement model.

data.title: Clearside Biomedical is exploring strategic options to advance its SCS delivery platform for retinal diseases.
data.description: An effective in-office procedure has been established for targeting and delivering a broad range of therapies for severe retinal diseases. This non-surgical method is repeatable, ensuring consistent treatment. The procedure offers promising outcomes for patients suffering from such conditions, with a proven track record.

data.title: Janus International Group (NYSE: JBI) to report Q2 2025 results on August 7, 2025, webcast/conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Temple, Georgia-based Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI) disclosed plans to unveil its Q2 2025 financial results prior to market opening on August 7, 2025. Janus, a global leader in access control tech and building products for the self-storage and commercial sectors, will also conduct a webcast and conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day for result review. This move aims to provide stakeholders and investors insight into the company's performance during this financial period.

data.title: RYVYL closed $6.0 million public offering, selling 15,384,615 shares at $0.39 each, with warrants.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, RYVYL Inc. (NASDAQ: RVYL), a key player in electronic payment technology, disclosed the completion of its recent public offering. The offering consisted of 15,384,615 shares of common stock (or prefunded warrants) and warrants allowing the purchase of an equivalent number of shares. Priced at $0.39 per share and warrant, the total public offering amounted to $0.39 per share. The warrants, which can be exercised instantly upon receipt, have an exercise price matching the share price and remain valid until the fifth anniversary of their issuance.

data.title: Stocks like Nvidia and Taiwan Semiconductor surged on strong earnings. GE Aerospace also rose. Keep an eye on Netflix.
data.description: Shares of Taiwan Semiconductor, a leading chipmaker for Nvidia, surged following robust earnings, contributing to the positive performance of the chip sector. Additionally, GE Aerospace saw a notable rally in its stock. The focus now shifts to Netflix, as investors anticipate its potential impact on the market. This news resulted in Dow Jones Futures experiencing a boost.

data.title: General Glen D. VanHerck joins C Speed's Board of Directors, bringing defense expertise to radar company.
data.description: An ex-NORAD and USNORTHCOM Commander is now providing strategic defense expertise to the cutting-edge radar company, C Speed, based in Syracuse, New York. As of July 17, 2025, C Speed, known for its advanced radar solutions powered by software, disclosed that General [Name] has joined the team. C Speed operates under NewSpring Holdings, a company platform, and continues to make strides in technological innovation in the radar industry.

data.title: Roblox introduces new safety features like Age Estimation, promoting secure connections for teens. #RobloxSafety
data.description: Researchers have discovered a potentially habitable exoplanet located approximately 110 light-years from Earth. This planet, named K2-18b, is twice the size of Earth and orbits within the habitable zone of its star, where conditions may be suitable for liquid water to exist. The planet's atmosphere contains hydrogen and helium, along with water vapor. The discovery was made using data from the Hubble Space Telescope and the Kepler Space Telescope. Scientists are excited about the possibility of finding signs of life on this distant world.

data.title: US FDA approves GSK's SHINGRIX in prefilled syringe. It simplifies administration process for healthcare with Zoster Vaccine.
data.description: In Philadelphia, GSK plc (LSE/NYSE: GSK) revealed the FDA's approval of a prefilled syringe version of SHINGRIX (Zoster Vaccine Recombinant, Adjuvanted) for shielding against shingles (herpes zoster). This new syringe eradicates the necessity to mix separate vials before use, streamlining the vaccination process for healthcare providers. The current vaccine format includes two vials.
